commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `isTrustedOfficialPluginInstall` to trust ClawHub community and private channel records when package/spec metadata matches the official catalog, with added registry tests and a repro script.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +89, Other +212. Total +303 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: an official ClawHub Microsoft Teams install cannot pass the current predicate because its catalog entry lacks `clawhubSpec`, and the plugin uses keyed state. I did not run the live container path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed because the blocker is the trust/provenance policy for host-managed plugin state, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: fix: trust all ClawHub channel types when package matches official catalog
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes issue #92516: Containerized/self-hosted deploys can't use externalized channel plugins from ClawHub because trust was gated to only official channel.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed**: All ClawHub channel types (official/community/private) should be trusted when the package matches the official catalog, enabling self-hosted deployments to use externalized channel plugins.

**Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw setup with Node.js 24

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
$ node --import tsx scripts/repro/issue-92516-clawhub-trust.mts
```

**Evidence after fix**:
```
=== Reproduction for issue #92516 ===
Verifying ClawHub installs from official catalog are trusted regardless of channel type

Testing ClawHub official channel...
✓ Official channel trusted

Testing ClawHub community channel...
✓ Community channel trusted

Testing ClawHub private channel...
✓ Private channel trusted

PASS: All ClawHub channel types (official/community/private) are trusted.
```

**Observed result after fix**: All three ClawHub channel types are now properly trusted when the package matches the official catalog.

**What was not tested**: Production self-hosted deployments with actual channel plugins.

## Changes

- **src/plugins/manifest-registry.ts**: Modified `isTrustedOfficialPluginInstall()` to trust all ClawHub channel types
- **src/plugins/manifest-registry.test.ts**: Added test coverage
- **scripts/repro/issue-92516-clawhub-trust.mts**: Added reproduction script

Fixes #92516
target.author: wangmiao0668000666
